title: Papertek Edu-Framework Grammar Data Schema
description: JSON Schema for grammar module data files in the Papertek Edu-Framework. Defines the structure of grammar content organized by lesson with support for multiple grammar module types.

additionalProperties.description: Array of grammar modules for a specific lesson (keyed by lesson ID, e.g., '1-1')

tittel.title: Title/Heading Module
tittel.description: A section heading or title within the grammar content

nivå.description: Heading level (3 for h3, 4 for h4, etc.)

tekst.description: The heading text, may contain HTML markup
Explanation text, may contain HTML, grammar-term spans, or word-lookup spans

pronomen-grid.title: Pronoun/Vocabulary Grid Module
pronomen-grid.description: Grid display for pronouns, vocabulary, or comparable items with translation and optional notes

kolonner.description: Number of columns in the grid

tysk.description: Target language content (German in current implementation)

norsk.description: Native language content (Norwegian in current implementation). In framework version, will be abstracted to 'native' field.

merknad.description: Optional note or annotation (e.g., formal vs. informal)

regel-tabell.title: Grammar Rule Table Module
regel-tabell.description: Tabular presentation of grammar rules with headers and rows

rader.description: Table rows, each row is an array of cells matching header count

liste.title: List Module
liste.description: Bulleted or numbered list of points

infoboks.title: Information Box Module
infoboks.description: Highlighted information or tip box with title and content

boksType.description: Type of information box (husk=remember, tips=tips, advarsel=warning, info=info). Determines visual styling.

innhold.description: Box content, may contain HTML markup

egne-notater.title: Student Notes Area Module
egne-notater.description: Designated area for student note-taking, often visible only in print

printOnly.description: If true, only display this section in print view
